description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 흐르는 황금빛 생명의 빛을 강조한, 살아있는 신경계를 닮은 심해 유기 구조체입니다.
description.en: A deep-sea organic structure representing a living nervous system, emphasizing the flow of golden life-light through emerald membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Synaptic Coral.' A colossal, breathing organic architecture resembling a deep-sea nervous system, composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D dark forest vascular structures. The entity is submerged in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, exhaling swirling #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar that flows like liquid electricity through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro cinematography focus on the rhythmic pulsation of translucent capillary systems and golden sap exchange. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution.
